title: EvidenceItemResult
description: Processing outcome for a single document within an ingestion job.

itemId.description: Service-assigned unique identifier for this evidence item within the index.

status.description: ACCEPTED: item passed all rules and was indexed. REJECTED: item failed one or more rules. SUPERSEDED: a newer item of the same type exists for this case.

fileSizeBytes.description: Byte size of the ingested document.

rulesApplied.description: Ordered list of validation rule codes evaluated against this item.

rulesPassed.description: Rule codes from rulesApplied that the item passed.

rulesFailed.description: Rule codes from rulesApplied that the item failed. Non-empty when status=REJECTED.

searchIndexId.description: Azure AI Search document key. Present when status=ACCEPTED.

chunkCount.description: Number of semantic chunks indexed. Present when status=ACCEPTED.
